zh.Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England, Unite: 英國諾廷加姆爾藍普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Stanhope I於1368年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾藍普頓時，他的父親John Stanhope50歲，母親Elizabeth Malovell50歲。他於1394年與Joan de Stavelegh在英國諾廷加姆爾藍普頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾被列為member of parliment for nottinghamshire。他去世於1436年4月9日在英國越可爾衛克菲德享年68歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾藍普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Stanhope I于1368年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾藍普頓时，他的父亲John Stanhope50岁，母亲Elizabeth Malovell50岁。他于1394年与Joan de Stavelegh在英国諾廷加姆爾藍普頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾被列为member of parliment for nottinghamshire。他去世于1436年4月9日在英国越可爾衛克菲德享年68岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾藍普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Stanhope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Stanhope (Durham), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + hop ‘valley’.

History: A family of this name have held the title Earl of Harrington since 1742, and were Earls of Chesterfield from 1628–1967. Philip Stanhope, 1st Earl of Chesterfield, was a Royalist soldier in the English Civil War. He was captured in 1643 and died in prison in 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Stanhope I was born in 1368, in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, John Stanhope, was 50 and his mother, Elizabeth Malovell, was 50. He married Joan de Stavelegh in 1394, in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as member of parliment for nottinghamshire in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 9 April 1436, in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Stanhope I est né en 1368, à Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John Stanhope, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Malovell, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Stavelegh en 1394, à Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliment for nottinghamshire à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1436, à Wakefield, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Stanhope I 1368 in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Stanhope 50 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Malovell 50. Er hat 1394 in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England Joan de Stavelegh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als member of parliment for nottinghamshire in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. April 1436 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Stanhope I è nato il nel 1368 nel Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, John Stanhope, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Malovell, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Stavelegh nel 1394, nel Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliment for nottinghamshire nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 9 aprile 1436, nel Wakefield, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Stanhope Iが1368年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアランプトンで生まれた時，父John Stanhopeは50歳，母Elizabeth Malovellは50歳であった。1394年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアランプトンでJoan de Staveleghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでの職業はmember of parliment for nottinghamshireと記録されている。彼は1436年4月9日にイギリスヨークシュアイアワケフィールドで68歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアランプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Stanhope I(이)가 1368년 영국 노틴그함실르 램프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Stanhope(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Malovell(은)는 50세였다. 그는 1394년 영국 노틴그함실르 램프턴에서 Joan de Stavelegh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 member of parliment for nottinghamshire이었다. 그는 1436년 4월 9일 영국 요르크실르 웨이크필드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 램프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Stanhope I nasceu em 1368, em Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Stanhope, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Malovell, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Stavelegh em 1394, em Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como member of parliment for nottinghamshire em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 9 de abril de 1436, em Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Stanhope I родился в 1368 г. в местности рамптон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Stanhope было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Malovell, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Stavelegh в 1394 г. в местности рамптон, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии member of parliment for nottinghamshire в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 9 апреля 1436 г. в местности веикефиелд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности рамптон, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Stanhope I nació en 1368, en Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Stanhope, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Malovell, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Joan de Stavelegh en 1394, en Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era member of parliment for nottinghamshire en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 9 de abril de 1436, en Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
